codeReview.summary: Implementation satisfies the feature intent: CLI summary now uses scoring.py to show weighted and raw overall scores per model+dtype and includes per-category weighted breakdowns. Added tests cover presence of weighted/raw summary output, category weighted section, multi-model display, and a case where weighted and raw diverge.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, commit diff, and related skill/shared-state docs for feature runner-weighted-scoring-integration. No blocking or non-blocking defects were identified in commit 2037237; feature review passes.
